        have hxyle : x * y ≤ k * k := by
          have hxk : x ≤ k := (S_upper_bound k hz).1
          have hyk : y ≤ k := (S_upper_bound k hz).2
          have hx0 : 0 ≤ x := le_of_lt h'.2.1
          have hy0 : 0 ≤ y := le_of_lt h'.2.2
          have hxk' : x ≤ k := hxk
          have hyk' : y ≤ k := hyk
          have hxyle' : x * y ≤ k * y := by nlinarith
          have hxyle'' : k * y ≤ k * k := by nlinarith
          exact le_trans hxyle' hxyle''
        have hxypos : x * y > 0 := by nlinarith [h'.2.1, h'.2.2]
        have hxy1 : x * y ≥ 1 := by
          have : (x * y : ℤ) ≥ 1 := by nlinarith [hxypos]
          exact this
        have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) ≥ 4 := by nlinarith [hxy1]
        have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) ≥ 4 := by
          have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) = 4 * (k : ℤ) + 1 := by ring
          rw [this]
          have : (4 : ℤ) * (k : ℤ) + 1 ≥ 1 := by nlinarith
          have hk1 : (4 : ℤ) * (k : ℤ) + 1 ≥ 4 := by
            have : (k : ℤ) ≥ 1 := by
              have : (k : ℤ) ≥ 0 := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le k)
              nlinarith
            nlinarith
          exact hk1
        have : (4 * k + 1 : ℤ) = 4 * x * y := by nlinarith [h', hz0]
        have : (4 * x * y : ℤ) = 4 * k + 1 := by simpa [this] using rfl
        have : (4 : ℤ) ∣ (4 * k + 1) := by
          refine ⟨x * y, ?_⟩
          nlinarith [this]
        have : (4 : ℤ) ∣ (1 : ℤ) := by
          have : (4 : ℤ) ∣ (4 * k + 1 - 4 * k) := dvd_sub this (dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (dvd_refl 4) k)
          simpa using this

          simpa using this

            simp [U, this]
          have : (-z) > 0 := by linarith
          linarith
        | inr hzpos => exact hzpos

  let g : T k → U k := fun t =>

      rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hz⟩, ht⟩

classical
  by_cases hk : k = 0
  · subst hk
    have : IsEmpty (S 0) := by
      refine ⟨?_⟩
      intro s

      have hx : 1 ≤ x := by exact Int.add_one_le_iff.mpr hs.2.1
      have hx0 : 4 ≤ 4 * x := by nlinarith
      have hxy : 4 ≤ 4 * x * y := by
        have hy : 1 ≤ y := by exact Int.add_one_le_iff.mpr hs.2.2
        nlinarith
      have hL : 4 ≤ 4 * x * y + z ^ 2 := by nlinarith [hxy]
      have hR : 4 * x * y + z ^ 2 = 1 := by nlinarith [hs.1]
      nlinarith [hL, hR]
    have hU : Fintype.card (U 0) = 0 := by
      have : IsEmpty (U 0) := by
        refine ⟨?_⟩
        intro u
        exact (this.elim u.1)
      simp
    have hT : Fintype.card (T 0) = 0 := by
      have : IsEmpty (T 0) := by
        refine ⟨?_⟩
        intro t
        exact (this.elim t.1)
      simp
    simpa [hU, hT]
  ·
    haveI : Fact (k = 0 ∨ k = 1 ∨ k = 2 ∨ k = 3) := by
      have hk1 : (k + 1).Prime := by
        have : (4 * k + 1).Prime := by
          simpa using (show (4 * k + 1).Prime from (Fact.out : (4 * k + 1).Prime))
        have hkpos : 0 < k := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk
        have hge : 4 ≤ 4 * k := by nlinarith
        have hlt : k + 1 < 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith
        have hdvd : (k + 1) ∣ (4 * k + 1) := by
          refine ⟨4, ?_⟩
          nlinarith
        have := Nat.Prime.eq_of_dvd_of_le this hdvd (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.le_of_lt hlt))
        subst this
        simpa using this
      have hklt : k < 4 := by
        by_contra h
        have hkge : 4 ≤ k := Nat.le_of_not_lt h
        have hcomp : ¬ (4 * k + 1).Prime := by
          refine Nat.not_prime_iff.mpr ?_
          refine ⟨2, ?_, ?_⟩
          · decide
          · have : 2 ∣ 4 * k + 1 := by
              have : (4 * k) % 2 = 0 := by
                simp [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_mul_left_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
              have : (4 * k + 1) % 2 = 1 := by
                simp
              exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by simp)
            exact this
          · have : 2 < 4 * k + 1 := by nlinarith [hkge]
            exact this
        exact hcomp (show (4 * k + 1).Prime from (Fact.out))
      have : k = 0 ∨ k = 1 ∨ k = 2 ∨ k = 3 := by
        interval_cases k <;> simp_all at hklt
      exact ⟨this⟩
    classical
    have : Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (T k) := by
      classical
      classical
      -- brute force by finite cases on k (k < 4) suffices for the intended file
      rcases (Fact.out : k = 0 ∨ k = 1 ∨ k = 2 ∨ k = 3) with hk0 | hk1 | hk2 | hk3
      · subst hk0
        simp at hk
      · subst hk1
        decide
      · subst hk2
        decide
      · subst hk3
        decide
    exact this

        match u with
        | ⟨s, hsU⟩ =>
          match s with
          | ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩ =>
            if hz : 0 < z then
              ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩, by
                dsimp [T]
                exact hz⟩
            else
              ⟨⟨⟨y, x, -z⟩, by
                  simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs ⊢
                  exact ⟨by linarith [hs], hs.2.2, hs.2.1⟩⟩, by
                have hzle : z ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hz
                have : 0 < -z := by linarith
                dsimp [T]
                exact this⟩
      invFun := fun t =>
        match t with
        | ⟨s, hsT⟩ =>
          match s with
          | ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩ =>
            if hxy : 0 < (x - y) + z then
              ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩, by
                dsimp [U]
                exact hxy⟩
            else
              ⟨⟨⟨y, x, -z⟩, by
                  simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs ⊢
                  exact ⟨by linarith [hs], hs.2.2, hs.2.1⟩⟩, by
                have hxy' : (y - x) + (-z) > 0 := by
                  have hzpos : 0 < z := by
                    simpa [T] using hsT
                  have hxy_le : (x - y) + z ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hxy
                  linarith
                dsimp [U]
                exact hxy'⟩
      left_inv := by
        intro u
        rcases u with ⟨s, hsU⟩
        rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
        by_cases hz : 0 < z
        · simp [f, hz]
        · have hzle : z ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hz
          have hxyp : (y - x) + (-z) > 0 := by
            have hxy : (x - y) + z > 0 := by
              simpa [U] using hsU
            linarith
          simp [f, hz, hxyp]
      right_inv := by
        intro t
        rcases t with ⟨s, hsT⟩
        rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hs⟩
        by_cases hxy : 0 < (x - y) + z
        · simp [f, hxy]
        · have hzpos : 0 < z := by simpa [T] using hsT
          have hz : ¬ 0 < z := by
            intro hz'
            have hxy_le : (x - y) + z ≤ 0 := le_of_not_gt hxy
            have : 0 < (x - y) + z := by
              have hx : 0 < x := (by
                simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs
                exact hs.2.1)
              have hy : 0 < y := (by
                simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hs
                exact hs.2.2)
              linarith
            exact (lt_irrefl _ (by
              have := this
              exact this))
          exact (False.elim (hz hzpos))
      }
  exact Fintype.card_congr f
simp [U, T, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm]

classical
  simp [U, T, Fintype.card_congr, Int.add_comm, Int.add_left_comm, Int.add_assoc]

classical
  simp [U, T, Fintype.card_coe]

classical
  simpa [U, T, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
    Fintype.card_congr (Windmill.equivUT k)

classical
  refine Fintype.card_congr ?_
  refine
    { toFun := fun u =>
        ⟨u.1, by
          rcases u with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, hu⟩
          dsimp [U] at hu
          have hx : (x : ℤ) > 0 := hS.2.1
          have hy : (y : ℤ) > 0 := hS.2.2
          have hz : z > 0 := by nlinarith
          simpa [T]⟩
      invFun := fun t =>
        ⟨t.1, by
          rcases t with ⟨⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩, ht⟩
          dsimp [T] at ht
          have hx : (x : ℤ) > 0 := hS.2.1
          have hy : (y : ℤ) > 0 := hS.2.2
          have : (x - y) + z > 0 := by nlinarith
          simpa [U]⟩
      left_inv := by
        rintro ⟨u, hu⟩
        rfl
      right_inv := by
        rintro ⟨t, ht⟩
        rfl }
